title: Run Card v2
description: Declarative run card for the computation workflow engine. Strict mode: unknown fields are errors. Schema version must be exactly 2.

run_id.description: Unique run identifier. CLI --run-id overrides this value if provided.

workflow_id.description: Workflow engine identifier. Must be computation for run_card v2.

description.description: Optional longer description of the run.

parameters.description: Typed parameter definitions. Keys are parameter names referenced in phase argv via ${name} syntax.

on_failure.description: DAG failure strategy. fail-fast: abort on first phase failure. continue: skip dependent phases, execute independent ones.

phases.description: Ordered list of execution phases forming a DAG.

headline_numbers.description: Extraction of key numeric results from phase outputs.

type.description: Parameter type. Used for CLI parsing and validation.

default.description: Default value when not provided via CLI --param. Must match the declared type.

phase_id.description: Unique identifier for this phase within the run card. Lowercase alphanumeric and underscores.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this phase does.

inputs.description: Input file paths. Paths referencing upstream outputs use phases/<upstream_id>/<path> relative to ${WORKSPACE}. Initial phase inputs (no depends_on) are relative to ${PROJECT_DIR}.

outputs.description: Output file paths relative to phase working directory. Copied to ${WORKSPACE}/phases/<phase_id>/ on success.

gates.description: Approval gates required before this phase executes (e.g. A3).

depends_on.description: Phase IDs that must all succeed before this phase can execute. All referenced IDs must exist in the phases array.

retries.description: Number of retry attempts on failure (0 = no retries).

kind.description: Backend type. Currently only shell is supported.

argv.description: Command and arguments. Script paths are relative to ${PROJECT_DIR}. Parameter references use ${param_name} syntax.

cwd.description: Working directory relative to ${PROJECT_DIR}. Must resolve within ${PROJECT_DIR} (containment enforced by engine).

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum execution time in seconds. Engine applies a default if omitted.

source.description: Path to the source JSON file, relative to ${WORKSPACE}.

extract.description: List of values to extract from the source file.

pointer.description: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer in URI fragment form (e.g. #/sigma_nlo_pb). Tilde escapes: ~0 for ~, ~1 for /.

label.description: Human-readable label for this headline number.

tier.description: Importance tier. T1: primary result, T2: secondary, T3: diagnostic.

json_numeric_checks.description: Numeric range checks on JSON output files.

path.description: Path to the JSON file, relative to ${WORKSPACE}.

pointer.description: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer in URI fragment form to the numeric value. Tilde escapes: ~0 for ~, ~1 for /.
